explorerComponent.syncProjectFolder: Syncronize project folder with the test folder content.

chatComponent.selectModelNote: Please select a model before starting to chat.

chatComponent.ollamaNotInstalled: There is no connection to any Ollama model. Please ensure that Ollama is installed in your system. Then, you must pull at least one model using: ollama pull <model_name>
